title: Yori3o's Relics 'n Jewelry
description: Adds various accessories, relics, spellbooks, etc.
body:
# 📖 Description

**Yori3o's Relics 'n Jewelry** brings a variety of accessories to your game, enhancing the player or granting unique abilities.

Some bonuses are only available with the Pufferfish's Attributes mod, but it is not required.

**Note: the mod is still in development, so any ids, attributes, etc. may change and break something during an update.**


## Features:

- Accessories provide both passive bonuses/immunities and active abilities, such as a dash or spell casting.

- There are cooldowns, hunger consumption, and other negative effects for balance.

- Relics can be found in various structures, including modded ones. Some can be crafted or dropped from monsters.

- Flexible settings, allowing you to customize everything.

- A full list of relics is available on the [wiki](https://github.com/yori3o/Yori3os-Relics-n-Jewelry/wiki/List-of-accessories-and-how-to-get-them) (Deprecated for v0.1.0, will be updated soon).

  

If you found a bug or have suggestions, create an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/yori3o/Yori3os-Relics-n-Jewelry/issues).
